untranslatable_reason: The Advance Block pattern requires detection of a three-candle sequence where the middle candle opens within the prior candle's body AND the last candle opens within the middle candle's body. This multi-bar lookback pattern with relative price positioning across three consecutive bars cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. Requires custom pattern recognition logic beyond simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation of shadow requirements (upper_wick >= body, lower_wick >= body) but cannot encode the full three-candle sequential logic with body-opening constraints. The pattern fundamentally requires multi-bar state tracking unavailable in the provided indicator set.
